message:
fix(search,ui,test): NaN-safe score normalization, Alt-key update shortcuts, robust PTY quit helper

Score normalization:
- Filter NaN values before computing min/max in normalize_scores() to
  prevent NaN from poisoning the entire normalization output
- Map NaN inputs to 0.0 in the output vector
- Handle all-NaN edge case by returning zeros instead of infinities
- Add test_score_normalization_constant_with_nan_keeps_nan_zeroed

Update banner shortcuts:
- Move update shortcuts from Shift+letter (U/N/S) intercepted via
  QueryChanged to proper Alt+key bindings (Alt+U, Alt+N, Alt+I) in the
  key event mapping, eliminating the need to check empty query state
  and preventing accidental shortcut triggers during typing
- Rename "skip" to "ignore" for clarity (Alt+I instead of S)
- Remove the can_handle_update_shortcuts query-empty guard since Alt
  modifiers don't conflict with typing
- Update banner text strings to show Alt+key notation

Latency tracing:
- Sort completed latency samples by generation before flushing for
  deterministic output ordering
- Sort stale/finalized generations for consistent supersession order

PTY test improvements:
- Add quit_tui_with_escape() helper that sends up to N Escape presses
  with settle delays, polling child exit between each press, replacing
  ad hoc double-escape sequences
- Rename test from tui_play_macro to tui_typing for accuracy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
